LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT EMMETT HEGARTY'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 23, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY 4:00 PM ON JANUARY 9, 2013 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION AND REPLY. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC. AND JIM KEIGHRAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 23, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY 4:00 PM ON JANUARY 9, 2013 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION AND REPLY. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENNA WARD, CSR # 7077

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC. AND JIM KEIGHRAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLEAD FACTS TO SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER EXTRINSIC EVIDENCE CITED IN REPLY TO THE MOTION. DEFENDANTS TO FILE THEIR ANSWER NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS FROM TODAY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC,, JIM KEIGHRAN MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

Appearances:
Mona Fotoohi, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.438.5933, for defendant and moving party;
John M. Feder, Esq. of Rouda Feder Tietjen McGuinn, Tel. 415.398.5398, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentive ruling. DEFENDANTs PEAK REALTY GROUP, INC. and JIM KEIGHRAN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. Plaintiff has sufficiently plead facts to support a claim for punitive damages. The Court does not consider extrinsic evidence cited in reply to the motion. Defendants to file their answer no later than 10 days from today. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mona Fotoohi, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.438.5933, for defendant and moving party;
John M. Feder, Esq. of Rouda Feder Tietjen McGuinn, Tel. 415.398.5398, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A copy of the opposition was sent to court prior to the hearing. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT EMMETT HEGARTY's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is denied. Plaintiff has sufficiently plead facts to support a claim for punitive damages. The Court does not consider extrinsic evidence cited in reply to the motion. Defendant to file his answer no later than 10 days from today. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
